sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Kumpipa hong maikai in, uan ding ni hong tungzo;
Tu a kipan gal sungah, Nang buk ko inn
Kigin sung nong hehpihna’n, kote hong hatsak a;
Hing tawntung Kumpipa tawh, galdo la

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Kumpipa hong makai in mawhna gal bei mateng;
Thau, tei le nam, khuangging tawh Pasian’ gam piang hi
Ki-it kihehpihna tawh, Pasian gam hong tung thei.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: in, lau lo kong zui uh hi;
Na mai kimuhna peuh-ah, lungdamna khuavak hi;
lam pai na’ng hong taan aw;
Galzawh lukhu’n hong ngak hi, Hong pi in Pasian aw.
